professional_standard_verdict.reason: Eleven units meet the professional floor, but Knoll's carried exact-96 closure condition remains visibly unsatisfied. At native 96x96 the pale receipt survives, while the pear-handled office stamp and its contact action collapse into the hands and cannot be distinguished from generic writing or paper handling. Critical dimensions are not averaged.

contract_coverage.criterion: Exactly twelve definitive full-body masters
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: All twelve masters exist, match manifest hashes, and were individually inspected.

contract_coverage.criterion: Three materially distinct rough silhouette options per unit
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: All twelve triptychs contain three differentiated body, pose, or dominant-shape proposals and match the selected letters recorded in the packet.

contract_coverage.criterion: Explicit trait-channel assignment covering all 22 traits
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Manifest and bible assign one art-primary channel plus separated secondary channels across all 22 traits; masters visibly preserve the dominant assignments.

contract_coverage.criterion: Gameplay role and recognizable hook preserved
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Tank mass, assassin movement, support apparatus, marksman axes, mage casting, and Kett's brawler fist are visible across the batch.

contract_coverage.criterion: Peak-condition fighter age and body policy
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Humanoids read as mature combat-capable adults; Nyxa reads as a dangerous batlike temporal predator before ordinary age or frailty.

contract_coverage.criterion: Applicable women are attractive, adult, lean, toned, feminine, and combat-capable
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Cashmere, Quillith, and Luna visibly meet the adult, lean/toned, feminine lane; Nyxa's deliberate-horror nonhuman exception is visually justified.

contract_coverage.criterion: Armor and protection appear only with role/design logic
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Frontliners use calcification, shell, flesh-fortress anatomy, or industrial protection; non-frontliners remain unarmored or lightly equipped.

contract_coverage.criterion: Psychology visible in face and posture rather than prose alone
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Same-master face crops show differentiated shame, appraisal, ingratiation, feral fixation, bureaucratic predation, corrective ownership, anticipated relief, split surveillance, demand, and cold certainty.

contract_coverage.criterion: Scary or villainous without universal generic anger
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: The batch spans coercive martyrdom, possessive enclosure, acquisition, identity theft, temporal predation, dissociation, administrative cruelty, controlling mentorship, labor rage, triangulation, tissue entitlement, and vindication.

contract_coverage.criterion: One dominant prop or anatomical idea per unit
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Each master has a controlled primary read: yoke, clamp, ledger, siphon hand, time-bow, blade ring, stamp/receipt, slate, fist, ligament, flesh clamp, or rifle.

contract_coverage.criterion: Supernatural cost visibly embodied
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Costs are carried through calcification, fused shell, tax-script, chemical mismatch, temporal aging, erased identity, eyelid scars, exposed nerves, ossified debt, split eyes, debtor tissue, and citation scarring.

contract_coverage.criterion: No anatomy, hand, or prop-integration failure
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Full-resolution masters show traceable limbs, grasp/contact logic, and integrated dominant anatomy without a material production-breaking discontinuity.

contract_coverage.criterion: No convergence into one costume, face, body, garment, palette, or demon family
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Contact and role boards show strongly separated body plans and dominant shapes; recurring dark dry rendering does not erase unit identity.

contract_coverage.criterion: Same-master exact-96 readability for every unit
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Eleven exact derivatives preserve their dominant hook. Knoll's native 96x96 derivative preserves a pale paper strip but not a recognizable pear-handled office stamp visibly contacting it.

contract_coverage.criterion: Veyra Round 4 closure test
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Selected-C rough, master, and exact 96 all show an open sideways jaw/clamp advancing on braced legs.

contract_coverage.criterion: Knoll Round 4 closure test
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: The selected-B rough and master pass, but the office-stamp subtype and contact action are not legible at native 96x96.

contract_coverage.criterion: Kett Round 4 closure test
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Face crop shows tight grievance plus a restrained one-corner lift; master preserves the single fist and forward impact line.

contract_coverage.criterion: Malachor Round 4 closure test
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Head angle and pupils visibly track down-right toward the clamp while the mouth demands rather than addresses the viewer frontally.

contract_coverage.criterion: Approved hard-matte Vellum finish authority
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: Both approved Vellum hashes match; Phase 2 masters broadly retain dry, grounded, separated materials without shiny BiRefNet drift.

contract_coverage.criterion: Evidence provenance and same-master derivation
contract_coverage.decisive_evidence: 48/48 artifact hashes match; 12/12 face crops and 12/12 exact-96 derivatives reproduce pixel-exactly from their recorded masters and operations.

Veyra.exact_evidence: Selected-C rough f9856e173468a9cf31b8ea4dd11d4c74d9fe0dfdffbe30089457748b6b4a209e, master 71f87981ce087511839c9732714ea51ea7ce57d0bf708a4bb738b5bf91544ebd, and exact 96 05774223a24582665c4376cd435c85b9a328b2f509e9d702f9793b3126171cc2 all show open lateral jaws, forward plate vectors, and braced lunge legs.
Veyra.closure_condition_result: The active sideways living-clamp read precedes egg, armadillo, shell, and passive-shield alternatives.

Knoll.exact_evidence: Selected-B rough c43e8987346c4a6b4f5d6982d726f4e7924d16a5160a848778b5cc4667d4e294 and master cc466a2420e77fe75d100d43440e2c5c6e6a40b6b3c578ce6c8331ce0bb0c254 show a small pear-handled stamp contacting a long receipt. In exact 96 6d13a255cdd09af3cdfd0c33deba66b3d06878ad4f2cc6a1de1fb426db0a29a7, the receipt remains visible but the stamp head and handle merge with the hands.
Knoll.closure_condition_result: Failed at the mandated exact-96 surface.
Knoll.testable_closure_condition: A replacement same-master exact 96x96 derivative, viewed natively without label or zoom, must make an independent observer identify a small pear-handled office stamp visibly contacting one long pale flexible receipt before writing, generic paper handling, hammer, anvil, table, block, staff, or cane.

Kett.exact_evidence: Face 3eddeb5b40f71eaa9bf63c3d1d20b51b8b04982bae28ce7e8992b32a465d55af shows grievance in the eyes and brow, compressed control, and a restrained one-corner lift. Master 53e16f7f4ccec0c642264c3ce45f2ca5ac9c4aa64dc16f1d447504001495a426 preserves the dominant fist and aligned target vector.
Kett.closure_condition_result: Grievance, restraint, and anticipated relief visibly coexist while the single-fist hierarchy remains intact.

Malachor.exact_evidence: Master d110e469af8426ad2c4d8369c870b00b03c6f75100affe32eccf6f3bba120954 and face 43027fe259865ef5bbe85742cf5eba63df567b2d7704c4b530d28b67430a9489 show the head tipped and pupils directed down-right toward the open clamp; the demand mouth is not a frontal viewer address.
Malachor.closure_condition_result: Head, pupils, and demand expression visibly track the clamp target.

findings.claim: Knoll's dominant Trader action is not legible at the required native 96x96 use size.
findings.exact_evidence: The master cc466a2420e77fe75d100d43440e2c5c6e6a40b6b3c578ce6c8331ce0bb0c254 clearly shows a pear-handled stamp contacting a flexible receipt. In the pixel-exact derivative 6d13a255cdd09af3cdfd0c33deba66b3d06878ad4f2cc6a1de1fb426db0a29a7, the pale receipt survives but the stamp becomes an indistinct dark mass between the hands. Compared with Kett's fist, Sable's rifle, Luna's ligament, and Veyra's clamp on the same 96 lineup, Knoll loses the prop subtype carrying his unit identity.
findings.impact: At the mandated board size, players can read a goblin handling paper but not the specific administrative marking attack. This fails the carried closure test, exact-96 contract, trait clarity, and downstream adoption requirement.
findings.falsification: Show a same-master native 96x96 derivative in which an independent observer identifies a small office stamp in visible contact with one long receipt before generic writing, paper handling, hammer, block, staff, cane, table, or anvil.

rejection_case.case: A demanding art director should reject the batch because the repaired cut explicitly promised closure of four known blockers, yet Knoll still requires the label, full-resolution master, or prior knowledge to recover the office-stamp action at the mandated use size.
rejection_case.consequence: The batch cannot truthfully claim every unit's dominant identity survives unchanged at 96px.

excellence_gap: Vellum remains ahead in controlled focal hierarchy and material storytelling density; several Phase 2 humanoids rely on a shared dark studio presentation and repeated fine etched surface treatment.
Cashmere, Quillith, Luna, and Sable are sufficiently distinct for the professional floor, but stronger excellence would widen garment, lighting, and facial-attitude separation further.

Several psychological contradictions are clear in face crops but become naturally unavailable at board size; excellent downstream presentation would pair the strong silhouettes with equally specific larger-card facial reads.
Some rough triptychs explore pose more than radically different construction logic; they satisfy the present contract but do not consistently reach category-leading breadth.
weak_proof: The visual-harness report's zero evidence failures proves artifact availability, not correct first read.
Labeled contact sheets prime the intended trait and prop interpretation before the viewer evaluates the image.
Three-times enlarged nearest-neighbor displays are useful diagnostics but cannot substitute for inspecting the literal native 96x96 pixels.
Psychology prose can explain a face after the fact and therefore cannot independently prove that the expression communicates unaided.
Hash and pixel-lineage success prove immutability and derivation, not professional quality.
missed_detection_causes: Reviewing Knoll's master immediately before the 96 derivative supplies the missing stamp interpretation through memory.
The high-contrast receipt survives reduction and creates a misleading impression that the entire stamp action survived with it.
Board labels explicitly state Trader and describe the stamp, masking the native first-read ambiguity.
Zoomed comparison boards make a sub-96 feature appear more legible than it is at the required native size.
Structural validators cannot test semantic recognition of a tiny prop subtype.

strongest_counterargument.argument: Knoll's full-resolution master and selected rough unmistakably show an office stamp on a receipt, while the exact 96 still shows two hands over one bright paper strip; role recognition may not require the precise stamp subtype.
strongest_counterargument.evidence: Master cc466a2420e77fe75d100d43440e2c5c6e6a40b6b3c578ce6c8331ce0bb0c254 and rough c43e8987346c4a6b4f5d6982d726f4e7924d16a5160a848778b5cc4667d4e294 are coherent and professionally finished.
strongest_counterargument.reason: The carried closure test explicitly requires the exact 96 derivative itself to read as a small office stamp visibly contacting one long receipt before alternate interpretations. General paper handling is not the recorded closure condition.
